name: dixie-flatline
description: Repo-local Markdown memory for GitHub Copilot and VS Code agents.

commands.title: Dixie Flatline: Update Memory from Diff

chatParticipants.name: project-memory
chatParticipants.description: Answers questions using repo-local project memory.

commands.name: explain
commands.description: Explain the active file using project memory.

commands.name: decisions
commands.description: Find decisions that affect the active file or prompt.

commands.name: update
commands.description: Suggest memory updates from current changes.

disambiguation.description: Questions about repository decisions, architecture, conventions, domain model, testing practices, or known issues stored in .llm-wiki memory.
examples: Explain this file using project memory
Summarise the auth flow from memory

languageModelTools.name: project-memory_searchProjectMemory
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Searches the repository-local .llm-wiki Markdown memory for project-specific architecture, decisions, conventions, testing notes, domain knowledge, and known issues. Use when Copilot needs durable context about this codebase.

languageModelTools.name: project-memory_getRelevantContext
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Returns memory entries relevant to an absolute or workspace-relative file path using frontmatter related_files, tags, filename matching, and text scoring.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Get memory context for a file.

languageModelTools.name: project-memory_getRelevantDecisions
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Returns accepted or proposed decisions from project memory that are relevant to a file path.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Get relevant memory decisions for a file.

languageModelTools.name: project-memory_recordDecision
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Records a human-readable architectural or behavioral decision into .llm-wiki/memory/decisions.md. Use only when the user asks to persist a decision.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Record a decision in project memory.

languageModelTools.name: project-memory_updateMemoryFromDiff
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Analyzes a git diff and returns suggested memory updates. The MVP uses deterministic heuristics and does not automatically write unless a calling command chooses to persist a decision.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Suggest project memory updates from a diff.

languageModelTools.name: project-memory_generateCopilotInstructions
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Builds .github/copilot-instructions.md content from project memory, emphasizing accepted decisions, constraints, conventions, architecture, testing notes, and known issues.

projectMemory.maxSearchResults.description: Maximum number of memory entries returned in chat and tools.
